checkin.journal:
Tough morning, cant sleep still really need to do something, did have a lot of training yesterday but still was also that something something is not letting me sleep in the morning, I took ruporut and it was better funny enough, good day in frankfurt was working a bit but not that much, first leg done, did a nappy - if anything the nappies are good to break the day and lower the cortisol - i maybe have to start doing this seriously specially on days that I am sleepy, I am the boss
Feeling weird
